description: Beautifully renovated Colonial on a tree-lined street in the heart of Montclair. Updated kitchen with quartz countertops, original hardwood floors throughout, finished basement, and a spacious backyard perfect for entertaining. Walking distance to downtown shops and restaurants.

Modern luxury condo just two blocks from the PATH station. Floor-to-ceiling windows, open-concept living, chef's kitchen with stainless steel appliances, in-unit washer/dryer, and a private balcony with NYC skyline views. Building amenities include gym, roof deck, and doorman.

Stunning center-hall Colonial in one of Summit's most desirable neighborhoods. Grand two-story foyer, gourmet kitchen with island, primary suite with spa bath, home office, and a professionally landscaped yard with in-ground pool. Top-rated schools.

Coastal modern townhouse steps from the beach. Open floor plan with soaring ceilings, custom built-ins, rooftop deck with ocean views, and a two-car attached garage. Smart home wiring throughout. HOA includes pool, fitness center, and landscaping.

Elegant estate on a private cul-de-sac in Princeton. Custom millwork throughout, chef's kitchen with double islands, four fireplaces, wine cellar, finished lower level with home theater, and resort-style backyard with heated pool and outdoor kitchen.

Brand-new boutique condo in the heart of downtown Jersey City. Open layout, European-style kitchen, wide-plank oak floors, and oversized windows flooding the space with natural light. One block from Grove Street PATH, surrounded by restaurants and parks.
